description: Fathom provides meeting recording, transcription, summaries, action items, and related meeting data. Its product lets users and teams access and automate meeting content and integrations around those records.
summary: Fathom exposes a documented REST API with an OpenAPI spec and an official OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://api.fathom.ai/mcp`; it also publishes TypeScript and Python SDKs but no standalone CLI or GraphQL API were found.
